lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: I'm studying the Invasion of the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: The Wintertodt is a fiercely cold being, capable of freezing entire areas with its mere presence. We do not know what exactly the Wintertodt is, nor where it came from.

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: When the Wintertodt first attacked, it was feared that all of Kourend would be lost. Fortunately, the Order of the Sacred Flame and Dinh the Master Smith were able to stop it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did they stop the Wintertodt?

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: Dinh was a great smith and engineer. He uncovered the power of the Bruma tree. Using bark from the tree and various metal compounds, Dinh forged the doors of the prison that hold the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: In addition, the Order of the Sacred Flame utilised the Bruma tree in firemaking. They heated the environment to subdue Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the invasion.

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: More than 137 decades ago, seemingly from nowhere, the Wintertodt began terrorising the lands north of Kourend, freezing everything within its path.

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: After five decades of this terror, the people of Kourend were able to quell the beast, containing it in an icy prison.

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: The Wintertodt remained subdued until very recently, when it began to threaten Kourend once more.

lines.speaker: Logios
lines.text: Fortunately, the Order of the Sacred Flame is able to contain the Wintertodt and prevent another attack.
